tickets.title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
tickets.description: Customer is unable to login into their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still facing authentication errors.

tickets.title: Unable to Download Invoice
tickets.description: Customer cannot download their invoice without error. The download button triggers a 404 error page.

tickets.title: App Crash on Launch
tickets.description: Customer experiences a crash while launching the app causing an unresponsive system. Happens on both iOS and Android.

tickets.title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
tickets.description: Customer is experiencing issues with two-factor authentication. SMS codes are not being received.

tickets.title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
tickets.description: Customer wants to disable automatic renewal for their subscription but cannot find the option in settings.

tickets.title: Payment Method Update Failed
tickets.description: Customer cannot update their payment method. Getting validation errors with correct card details.

tickets.title: Data Export Not Working
tickets.description: Customer requests data export but the export function keeps timing out after 5 minutes.

tickets.title: Email Notification Delay
tickets.description: Customer reports significant delays in receiving email notifications for important updates.

tickets.title: API Integration Failure
tickets.description: Customer's third-party API integration stopped working after recent update. Getting 401 errors.

tickets.title: Account Deletion Request
tickets.description: Customer wants to delete their account but cannot find the option in privacy settings.

tickets.title: Mobile Responsiveness Issue
tickets.description: Website layout breaks on mobile devices. Elements overlap and become unclickable.

tickets.title: Password Reset Loop
tickets.description: Customer stuck in password reset loop. Reset emails received but links lead to expired pages.

tickets.title: Search Function Broken
tickets.description: Search feature returns no results even for existing content. Filter options also not working.

tickets.title: File Upload Size Limit
tickets.description: Customer cannot upload files even when they're under the specified size limit.

tickets.title: Dashboard Loading Slow
tickets.description: Dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load. Customer reports this started happening this week.
